name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES participants, coordinator, state, messages, decision
State == {"init", "prepared", "committed", "aborted"}

(* Message structure: [type \in {"Prepare", "VoteYes", "VoteNo", "Commit", "Abort"},
                      from \in participants \cup {coordinator},
                      to \in participants \cup {coordinator}] *)

Message == [type \in {"Prepare", "VoteYes", "VoteNo", "Commit", "Abort"},
            from \in participants \cup {coordinator},
            to \in participants \cup {coordinator}]

(* Initial state: all participants are in "init" state, no messages in transit, decision is undefined *)
Init == /\ participants = {1, 2, 3}  \* Example set of participants
       /\ coordinator = 0
       /\ state = [p \in participants \cup {coordinator} |-> "init"]
       /\ messages = {}
       /\ decision = "undefined"

(* Coordinator sends Prepare to all participants *)
SendPrepare == /\ messages' = messages \cup { [type |-> "Prepare", from |-> coordinator, to |-> p] : p \in participants }
               /\ state' = state
               /\ decision' = decision

(* Participant receives Prepare and votes Yes or No *)
ReceivePrepare == /\ \E p \in participants :
                    /\ [type |-> "Prepare", from |-> coordinator, to |-> p] \in messages
                    /\ state[p] = "init"
                    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "prepared"]
                    /\ messages' = messages \ { [type |-> "Prepare", from |-> coordinator, to |-> p] }
                    /\ decision' = decision

(* Participant sends VoteYes or VoteNo *)
SendVoteYes == /\ \E p \in participants :
                 /\ state[p] = "prepared"
                 /\ messages' = messages \cup { [type |-> "VoteYes", from |-> p, to |-> coordinator] }
                 /\ state' = state
                 /\ decision' = decision

SendVoteNo == /\ \E p \in participants :
                /\ state[p] = "prepared"
                /\ messages' = messages \cup { [type |-> "VoteNo", from |-> p, to |-> coordinator] }
                /\ state' = state
                /\ decision' = decision

(* Coordinator receives all VoteYes and decides to commit *)
ReceiveAllVoteYes == /\ \E p \in participants :
                       /\ [type |-> "VoteYes", from |-> p, to |-> coordinator] \in messages
                       /\ state[p] = "prepared"
                       /\ decision = "undefined"
                       /\ decision' = "commit"
                       /\ messages' = messages \ { [type |-> "VoteYes", from |-> p, to |-> coordinator] }
                       /\ state' = state

(* Coordinator receives any VoteNo and decides to abort *)
ReceiveVoteNo == /\ \E p \in participants :
                   /\ [type |-> "VoteNo", from |-> p, to |-> coordinator] \in messages
                   /\ state[p] = "prepared"
                   /\ decision = "undefined"
                   /\ decision' = "abort"
                   /\ messages' = messages \ { [type |-> "VoteNo", from |-> p, to |-> coordinator] }
                   /\ state' = state

(* Coordinator sends Commit or Abort to all participants *)
SendCommit == /\ decision = "commit"
              /\ messages' = messages \cup { [type |-> "Commit", from |-> coordinator, to |-> p] : p \in participants }
              /\ state' = state
              /\ decision' = decision

SendAbort == /\ decision = "abort"
             /\ messages' = messages \cup { [type |-> "Abort", from |-> coordinator, to |-> p] : p \in participants }
             /\ state' = state
             /\ decision' = decision

(* Participant receives Commit and updates state *)
ReceiveCommit == /\ \E p \in participants :
                   /\ [type |-> "Commit", from |-> coordinator, to |-> p] \in messages
                   /\ state[p] = "prepared"
                   /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "committed"]
                   /\ messages' = messages \ { [type |-> "Commit", from |-> coordinator, to |-> p] }
                   /\ decision' = decision

(* Participant receives Abort and updates state *)
ReceiveAbort == /\ \E p \in participants :
                  /\ [type |-> "Abort", from |-> coordinator, to |-> p] \in messages
                  /\ state[p] = "prepared"
                  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "aborted"]
                  /\ messages' = messages \ { [type |-> "Abort", from |-> coordinator, to |-> p] }
                  /\ decision' = decision

(* Next action: any of the above actions can occur *)
Next == \/ SendPrepare
      \/ ReceivePrepare
      \/ SendVoteYes
      \/ SendVoteNo
      \/ ReceiveAllVoteYes
      \/ ReceiveVoteNo
      \/ SendCommit
      \/ SendAbort
      \/ ReceiveCommit
      \/ ReceiveAbort

(* Type invariant: all variables have correct types *)
TypeOK == /\ participants \subseteq Nat
          /\ coordinator \in Nat
          /\ state \in [participants \cup {coordinator} -> State]
          /\ messages \subseteq [type \in {"Prepare", "VoteYes", "VoteNo", "Commit", "Abort"},
                                 from \in participants \cup {coordinator},
                                 to \in participants \cup {coordinator}]
          /\ decision \in {"commit", "abort", "undefined"}

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<participants, coordinator, state, messages, decision>>

====

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Fork ownership: forks[i] = j means fork i is held by philosopher j; forks[i] = -1 means fork i is free *)
Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> -1]
        /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

Next == \/ (* Philosopher i becomes hungry *)
          /\ i \in 1..N
          /\ states[i] = "thinking"
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
        \/ (* Philosopher i picks up forks if both are free *)
          /\ i \in 1..N
          /\ states[i] = "hungry"
          /\ forks[i] = -1
          /\ forks[%(i, N) + 1] = -1
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![%(i, N) + 1] = i]
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
        \/ (* Philosopher i puts down forks after eating *)
          /\ i \in 1..N
          /\ states[i] = "eating"
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = -1, ![%(i, N) + 1] = -1]
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

TypeOK == /\ forks \in [1..N -> 1..N \cup {-1}]
          /\ states \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]
          /\ \A i \in 1..N : forks[i] = -1 \/ forks[i] \in 1..N
          /\ \A i \in 1..N : forks[i] = -1 \/ forks[i] = i

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

Init == /\ q = <<>>
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ size = 0

ProducerAction == /\ size < K
                 /\ head' = head
                 /\ tail' = tail
                 /\ size' = size + 1
                 /\ q' = Append(q, head)

ConsumerAction == /\ size > 0
                 /\ head' = head
                 /\ tail' = tail
                 /\ size' = size - 1
                 /\ q' = Tail(q)

Next == ProducerAction \/ ConsumerAction

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = <<>>
       /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active' = FALSE
          /\ readers' = Append(readers, 1)
        \/ /\ writer_active' = TRUE
          /\ readers' = <<>>
        \/ /\ writer_active' = FALSE
          /\ readers' = Tail(readers)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>> ==

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLE token

Init == /\ token \in 1..N

Next == /\ token' \in 1..N
        /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL

VARIABLES store

Init == store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

Next == \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
      \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = NULL]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>
